title: SetSpawn Plugin
description: A plugin that lets players teleport to a set spawn point
body:
SetSpawn is a simple and lightweight plugin that adds the /setspawn and /spawn commands to your Minecraft server — perfect for survival, minigames, or hub setups.
Features:

- /setspawn – Sets the global spawn location.
  🔒 Permission: system.setspawn

- /spawn – Teleports the player to the set spawn point.
  🔒 Permission: system.spawn
